verdict_reasoning: HSP60/HSPD1 is canonically a mitochondrial matrix chaperonin, but there is well-documented surface translocation under stress, infection, and pro-inflammatory conditions. Multiple studies confirm HSP60 on the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane of various cell types (tumor cells, immune cells, cardiomyocytes under stress), where it acts as a DAMP/innate-immune signaling molecule accessible to antibodies and immune effectors. This documented cell-state-induced surface pool qualifies as contextual via its own trafficking mechanism to the outer leaflet.
